# Lists

- Dash bullet
- Second dash bullet

* Asterisk bullet

+ Plus bullet

1. First
2. Second
9. Source numbering need not be sequential

1. Ordered top level
   - Nested unordered
     1. Deeper ordered
2. Back to the top level
   with a lazily continued second line

- [ ] Unchecked task
- [x] Checked task
  - [x] Nested completed subtask
  - [ ] Nested pending subtask
